title: Changelog entries now sort by actual merge time
summary: The What's New / changelog list is now ordered strictly by when each change actually merged — down to the time of day — so several updates that shipped on the same day appear in the true order they landed, newest first, instead of being shuffled by entry name.
highlights: Entries sort by the PR's real merge timestamp (time-of-day precision), not just the calendar day
Same-day updates no longer appear out of order
Merge time is recorded automatically when a PR merges, with a deploy-time backfill as a safety net
